questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Labour
questions.question_text: What are the key observations you would monitor for a patient with labour?
expected_points: Assess labour using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to labour
Implement evidence-based interventions for labour
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in maternity setting
